data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The requirement to validate the 'Print-to-mail service integration (Lob, Inkit)' is not directly supported by any provided evidence. While the linked use case mentions this integration as a need, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm its implementation or functionality. Therefore, the validation cannot be completed, leading to a blocked status.
gaps: No evidence of the Print-to-mail service integration (Lob, Inkit).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
